title: Fix booking form visibility logic for pickup and drop fields

requirements.summary: Fix pickup manual fields visibility to depend exclusively on pickupLocationMode, removing any journeyType dependencies
acceptanceCriteria: When pickupLocationMode === 'manual', pickup pincode and pickup area inputs are visible regardless of journeyType.
When pickupLocationMode === 'gps', pickup pincode and pickup area inputs are hidden regardless of journeyType.
No conditional rendering block for pickup fields references journeyType.

file_operations.description: Update the conditional rendering for pickup pincode and pickup area input fields to check only pickupLocationMode === 'manual'. Remove any existing conditions that reference journeyType for these pickup fields. The visibility logic must be: show pickup fields if and only if pickupLocationMode === 'manual', hide them if pickupLocationMode === 'gps'.

requirements.summary: Fix drop field visibility and required flags using journeyType and returnToSamePickup logic
acceptanceCriteria: When journeyType === 'oneway', drop pincode and drop area fields are visible and have the required attribute.
When journeyType === 'roundtrip' and returnToSamePickup === true, drop pincode and drop area fields are not rendered.
When journeyType === 'roundtrip' and returnToSamePickup === false, drop pincode and drop area fields are visible and have the required attribute.

file_operations.description: Update the conditional rendering and required attribute for drop pincode and drop area fields using this exact logic: if journeyType === 'oneway', render drop fields with required={true}; if journeyType === 'roundtrip' and returnToSamePickup === true, do not render drop fields; if journeyType === 'roundtrip' and returnToSamePickup === false, render drop fields with required={true}. Ensure drop field visibility depends only on journeyType and returnToSamePickup state.

requirements.summary: Set pickupLocationMode to 'manual' when GPS geolocation permission is denied or getCurrentPosition fails
acceptanceCriteria: When the user denies geolocation permission, pickupLocationMode is set to 'manual' and pickup pincode/area fields become visible.
When getCurrentPosition fires its error callback for any reason, pickupLocationMode is set to 'manual' and pickup pincode/area fields become visible.

file_operations.description: In the GPS geolocation handler where navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition is called, ensure that both the permission-denied error path and the general error callback set pickupLocationMode to 'manual'. This will trigger the visibility of pickup pincode and pickup area fields as a fallback when GPS location cannot be obtained.
